Website Back Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 8th February, 2005 at 13:11 GMT
  
Hey, I'm extremely sorry for all the downtime we just experienced; while doing some routine maintainance we encountered a few unexprected errors and had to re-install a few things on the server, poor response times from the datacenter only extended the time we had to wait for things to be done. All those who have a premium membership will have their subscription time increased by one week to compensate. Again i'm extremely sorry about this; in the future we will orgonise a backup server and domain so there is not so much downtime. On saturday i'll be putting up some new media so stay tuned.
Samurai X & Samurai Champloo Episodes Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 23rd January, 2005 at 19:07 GMT
  
Hey, sorry for the lack of updates; I've been tied down by school work for the last few weeks and have been working on the new version of dbgt (rebirth 05) which you can read about in the forums. I have uploaded episodes from Samurai X and Samurai Champloo; they are both great animes.
Final Fantasy Unlimited & Samurai 7 Episodes Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 11th January, 2005 at 19:10 GMT
  
Hey, I've just put up some final fantasy unlimted episodes and some samurai 7 episodes. Please enjoy...Stay posted as I will be putting up kenshin episodes at the weekend.
Media Server Back Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 8th January, 2005 at 00:19 GMT
  
Hey, just letting you know the standard media server is back up and running. Please enjoy; I'll be releasing some new anime episodes tomorror aswell :) Stay tuned.
Standard Media Server Temporarily Down
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 6th January, 2005 at 22:52 GMT
  
Hey, I'm really sorry about this...bin so busy over the past few days I didn't realise the standard media server was down. I've just e-mailed tech support; hopefully It should be back up within the next 24 hours. Extremely sorry for any inconvenience.
Detective Conan Episodes + December's Competition Winner
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 1st January, 2005 at 18:30 GMT
  
Hey, I've uploaded some Detective Conan episodes; episodes 1-40 to be precise. The episodes are encoded in real media format and are typically arround 50MB in size. I'll be adding more episodes from different anime series over the next few weeks. Enjoy.

Congatulations to Chris Blocton, the winner of the december's prize draw (Animatrix DVD). Look out for details on january's prize draw.
Damn Leechers
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 28th December, 2004 at 20:54 GMT
  
Hey, I'm really sorry I have to do this; I disabled hotlink protection on our media for just one day, and already I've found over 100 sites leaching our media...I've had no choice but to turn hotlink protection back on...so, sorry no more special download features. If your looking to do some serious downloading I recommend purchasing a premium subscription.
NEW DOWNLOAD FEATURES
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 28th December, 2004 at 00:20 GMT
  
Hey, we've introduced some new download features; you will now be able to queue and resume downloads with a certified download manager called 'star downloader'. CLICK HERE FOR MORE INFORMATION
We Wish You A Merry Christmas & A Happy New Year
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 27th December, 2004 at 11:21 GMT
  
Hey, merry christmas everybody. Sorry there havn't been many updates over the last few days; I've been really busy at home with family etc... Some time soon, dbgt.com will go down for a few hours as we are getting the hard drive on our server upgraded....so please don't worry if you suddenly find you can't access anything. As for updates; I will start uploading some new anime series as soon as we get the new hard drive installed.
Naruto Episode 114
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 17th December, 2004 at 21:58 GMT
  
Hey, sorry it's a bit late. Naruto episode 114 is now up for grabs.
